text: Unemployment rates in Nov. 2025 ranged from 2.1% in SD to 5.5% in CA and 6.5% in DC.
Q3 2025 house price growth over the year ranged from -2.3% in FL to 6.9% in IL.
Q3 2025 state GDP growth over the year ranged from 0.3% in WY to 3.5% in SC.
Among states, Nov. 2025 average weekly earnings ranged from MS’s $986 to WA’s $1,550.
Retail employment in Nov. 2025 fell year-over-year in 19 states and DC.
Q3 2025 real accommodation and food services GDP was below pre-pandemic levels in 23 states and DC.
TX’s annual house price change in Q3 2025 was negative for the first time since Q3 2011.
Q3 2025 manufacturing GDP growth over the year ranged from -2.6% in AZ to 8.7% in NV.
In Nov. 2025, NH saw the steepest year-over-year decline in leisure and hospitality jobs.
